meaning: GEMM or dot-product semantics execute on the tensor engine
Elementwise add executes on vector add lanes
Elementwise subtract reuses the add/sub lane
Elementwise multiply executes on vector multiply lanes
Elementwise divide executes on a divide lane or divider engine
notes: Used when divide is not fused into softmax.

meaning: Reduction semantics execute on a reduction tree or reduction engine
notes: Used when no fused softmax-like block absorbs the reduction.

meaning: Standalone exponential executes on a special-math engine
Broadcast may be free as a logical layout view or redirected to movement if materialized
Explicit copies or materialized movement execute on DMA
Fused softmax block replaces the four primitive operations
Fused exp-plus-reduce block replaces two primitive operations
notes: Used when only partial softmax fusion exists.
